description: Copy file paths and Git repository URLs from Explorer and editor tabs.
command.copyWorkspaceRelativePath: Copy Path Relative to Workspace Folder
command.copyRepositoryRelativePath: Copy Path Relative to Repository Root
configuration.remoteUrlFormat.markdownDe: Format used by **Copy Repository URL**. `https` converts common SSH remotes to browser-friendly HTTPS URLs; `preserve` copies the Git remote exactly as configured.
configuration.remoteName.description: Git remote name used by Copy Repository URL.
